def solve(grid, k)
  m = grid.size
  n = grid[0].size
  count = 0
  directions = [[-1, 0], [1, 0], [0, -1], [0, 1]]
  
  for i in 0...m
    for j in 0...n
      if grid[i][j] > 0
        queue = [[i, j]]
        sum = grid[i][j]
        grid[i][j] = 0
        
        while !queue.empty?
          x, y = queue.pop
          directions.each do |dx, dy|
            nx = x + dx
            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n
              if grid[nx][ny] > 0
                sum += grid[nx][ny]
                grid[nx][ny] = 0
                queue << [nx, ny]
              end
            end
          end
        end
        
        if sum % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  count
end

            ny = y + dy
            if nx >= 0 && nx < m && ny >= 0 && ny < n
              if grid[nx][ny] > 0
                sum += grid[nx][ny]
                grid[nx][ny] = 0
                queue << [nx, ny]
              end
            end
          end
        end
        
        if sum % k == 0
          count += 1
        end
      end
    end
  end
  
  count
end
